plan.title: Generic-terminal swarm fallback should offer serial self-execution instead of only manual prompt paste

narratives.Description: When no native agent dispatch primitive is available, the swarm workflow still falls back to asking the operator to paste worker prompts into terminals. This story adds a clear degraded path where the monitor can offer to execute the prepared worker prompts serially in the isolated worktrees, preserving forward progress without pretending it is parallel orchestration.
narratives.ImplementationPlan: Update the swarm launch guidance around the generic-terminal descriptor in `skills/deft-directive-swarm/SKILL.md` so it distinguishes manual prompt paste from an explicit serial self-execution downgrade. Add content tests in `tests/content/test_swarm_skill.py` that pin the no-orchestration behavior, the operator consent language, and the prohibition against calling the serial downgrade a true swarm.
narratives.UserStory: As a first-time operator without an available agent dispatch primitive, I want the swarm monitor to offer serial self-execution, so that I can continue without manually pasting prompts into multiple terminals.
narratives.Traces: Issue #1053 Failure 1; current swarm Phase 3 runtime descriptor still routes `generic-terminal` to manual terminal launch.

items.title: Generic terminal descriptor exposes serial downgrade

narrative.Acceptance: Given runtime detection returns the `generic-terminal` descriptor, when the swarm skill presents launch routing, then it shows a serial self-execution downgrade option with explicit operator consent.

items.title: Manual paste remains available but not defaulted silently

narrative.Acceptance: Given no orchestration primitive is available, when the operator declines serial self-execution, then the skill keeps the manual terminal prompt-paste fallback available with clear tradeoffs.

items.title: Serial downgrade is labeled as non-parallel

narrative.Acceptance: Given the serial downgrade is selected, when the skill describes execution mode, then it states that work will run one story at a time and is not true concurrent swarm execution.

expected_outputs: tests/content/test_swarm_skill.py passes and pins the generic-terminal serial downgrade wording.

references.title: Issue #1053: Consumer swarm fails on greenfield projects — no dispatch mechanism, bootstrap gap, PS 5.1 exit codes
